_meta.description: Cross-source tuple catalog — declares every meaningful intersection between ingested data sources. Tuples are curated, not auto-generated. Add a new tuple when a new source is ingested and you can identify specific section pairs that interact with an existing source. Never infer tuples automatically.

sibc_x_atm_pos.title: Credit × Payments
sibc_x_atm_pos.rationale: Credit card outstanding in SIBC and CC transaction volumes in ATM/POS measure the same lending population from two angles — stock vs flow. Personal loan sub-categories in SIBC (vehicle, consumer durables) correlate with debit card spend patterns. These two sources produce a richer picture of consumer credit behaviour than either source alone.

section_pairs.note: CC outstanding (SIBC stock) vs CC POS + ecom transaction volumes (ATM/POS flow) — divergence signals utilisation change or portfolio mix shift
Consumer credit growth in SIBC vs debit card digital spend footprint in ATM/POS — low digital debit share alongside high personal loan growth indicates cash-dependent borrower base

sibc_x_atm_pos.update_trigger: Update when either SIBC personalLoans section or ATM/POS credit_cards / debit_cards domain shows meaningful movement in the period's Layer 2a system model. Cross-source FOUNDATION when both constituent sources have completed a FOUNDATION pass.
